info.description: Bakkt Banking API for complete banking operations. Create checking and savings accounts, manage beneficiaries, send and receive money via ACH, SEPA, and international payment rails. Includes remittance services, transaction processing, card management, and account statements.
info.title: Accounts API

status.description: All these status are also sent via our webhook

transaction_id.description: Either a transaction hash or a uuid for fiat transfers

sender_details.description: Only present for fiatToCrypto transactions and only available to certain merchants.

transaction_id.description: Either a transaction hash or a uuid for fiat transfers

first_name.description: Only letters (no accents), and spaces. No numbers or special characters.

last_name.description: Only letters (no accents), and spaces. No numbers or special characters.

beneficiary_country.description: Country. The code of country according to ISO 3166-1 Alpha 2

account_details.description:
Account details vary by currency and country. See property descriptions for requirements:
- PKR: Requires currency, account_number, bank_code, account_type
- INR: Requires currency, account_number, ifsc
- USD: Requires currency, bank_code, account_number, bank_name, beneficiary_date_of_birth, beneficiary_state, beneficiary_street, beneficiary_zip, beneficiary_city
- EUR/TRY: Requires currency, iban
- GBP: Requires currency, account_number, sort_code
- NGN: Requires currency, account_number, bank_code

currency.description: The currency of the bank account (Required for PKR accounts, Required for INR accounts, Required for USD accounts, Required for EUR accounts, Required for GBP accounts, Required for TRY accounts, Required for NGN accounts)

account_number.description: The bank account number. **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use 12345678911112. (Required for PKR accounts, Required for INR accounts, Required for USD accounts, Required for GBP accounts, Required for NGN accounts)

bank_code.description: The bank's code... **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use EASYPAISA. (Required for PKR accounts, Required for USD accounts, Required for NGN accounts)

account_type.description: The account type (BA: Bank Account, DW: Digital Wallet). **Sandbox Testing for PKR:** Use BA. (Required for PKR accounts)

ifsc.description: The bank's IFSC (Required for INR accounts)

bank_name.description: Name of the bank (Required for USD accounts)

beneficiary_date_of_birth.description: Date format should be YYYY-MM-DD (Required for USD accounts)

beneficiary_state.description: State. Allowed characters: - all latin letters (A-Z, a-z) and numbers (0-9) - special characters: ./,()'- # and space  (Required for USD accounts)

beneficiary_street.description: Street. Allowed characters: - all latin letters (A-Z, a-z) and numbers (0-9) - special characters: ./,()'- # and space  (Required for USD accounts)

beneficiary_zip.description: Zip format based on https://74353748992479739.s3.amazonaws.com/files/zip_code_format.html (Required for USD accounts)

beneficiary_city.description: City name. Allowed characters: - all latin letters (A-Z, a-z) and numbers (0-9) - special characters: ./,()'- # and space  (Required for USD accounts)

iban.description: The bank account number (Required for EUR accounts, Required for TRY accounts)

sort_code.description: The bank's sort code (Required for GBP accounts)

post.summary: Create a checking Bakkt bank account for the user
post.description:
Creates a checking Bakkt bank account for the user making the request, identified by `unblock-session-id`. The account supports deposits from:
- **1st party senders**: the user's own bank account.
- **3rd party senders**: bank accounts owned by others.

**Note:** If you intend to send fiat *to* a third-party recipient, use the [`/banking/user/remittance/beneficiary`](https://docs.bakkt.com/api-reference/payments/post_user-remittance-beneficiary) endpoint to set up their receiving account instead.

post.summary: Create a savings Bakkt bank account for the user
post.description:
Creates a savings account for the user making the request, identified by `unblock-session-id`. The account supports deposits from:
- **1st party senders**: the user's own bank account.
- **3rd party senders**: bank accounts owned by others.

**Note:** Savings accounts earn interest on deposited funds. Use the [`/banking/user/account/bakkt`](https://docs.api.bakkt.com/reference/post_user-bank-account-bakkt) endpoint to create a checking account instead.
